caption:
London lunch cruise on the River Thames🌊✨

🎁get 15% off with the code SUMMER15 when booking via the link in bio 

I recently joined a lunch cruise with @CityCruisesUK This experience includes a delicious two-course menu made with high-quality ingredients, which you can enjoy while sailing past panoramic views of London 🇬🇧

Menu highlights: roasted supreme of chicken (with a creamy leek, tarragon and mushroom sauce, served with Lyonnaise potatoes and seasonal vegetables) or a vegetarian option (foraged oyster mushroom and white bean cassoulet) 👨‍🍳 For dessert, we tried the baked rose water and strawberry cheesecake (served with a berry coulis), the perfect sweet treat 🍓Plus, there’s a bar on board if you’d like to order drinks during your cruise 🍹

We also got a chance to see landmarks such as Big Ben, the London Eye, St Paul’s Cathedral and Tower Bridge 🏙️, and live commentary was available along the way

Save it for later 📌Whether you’re visiting London for the first time or live here and are looking for something different, this is a special activity to try ✨

⏱️Duration: 1 hour 45 minutes

🔗Link to book London lunch cruise on the River Thames saved in bio
